testcases.input: obj = [null, 0, false, 1] Output: [1] Explanation: All falsy values have been removed from the array.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1] Explanation: All falsy values have been removed from the array.

testcases.input: obj = {"a": null, "b": [false, 1]} Output: {"b": [1]} Explanation: obj["a"] and obj["b"][0] had falsy values and were removed.
testcases.expectedOutput: {"b": [1]} Explanation: obj["a"] and obj["b"][0] had falsy values and were removed.

testcases.input: obj = [null, 0, 5, [0], [false, 16]] Output: [5, [], [16]] Explanation: obj[0], obj[1], obj[3][0], and obj[4][0] were falsy and removed.
testcases.expectedOutput: [5, [], [16]] Explanation: obj[0], obj[1], obj[3][0], and obj[4][0] were falsy and removed.
